violations.text: Apple cider labels, packaged in the food establishment, are lacking the quantity of the contents. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the garage, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The floor in the production area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
